title: T Cell Isolation from Mouse Tissues
author: Kristin Anderson
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sqnedve
materials: Quench lysis using 10mL T cell media.

steps.title: Harvest cells by smashing spleen through a 70um filter
steps.instruction: Harvest cells by smashing spleen through a 70um filter.

steps.title: Spin down cells at 369 xg...
steps.instruction: Spin down cells at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and lyse red blood...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and lyse red blood cells with 2 mL ACK lysis buffer for 2 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Spin down cells at 369 xg...
steps.instruction: Spin down cells at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and resuspend cells in T cell media
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and resuspend cells in T cell media. Store on ice until use.

steps.title: Spin down cells at 369 xg...
steps.instruction: Spin down cells at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and lyse red blood...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and lyse red blood cells with 2 mL ACK lysis buffer for 2 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Quench lysis using 2mL T cell media
steps.instruction: Quench lysis using 2mL T cell media. Spin down cells at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and lyse red blood...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and lyse red blood cells a second time with 2 mL ACK lysis buffer for 2 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Quench lysis using 2mL T cell media
steps.instruction: Quench lysis using 2mL T cell media. Spin down cells at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and resuspend cells in T cell media
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and resuspend cells in T cell media. Store on ice until use.

steps.title: Excise tumor from animal and remove normal tissue
steps.instruction: Excise tumor from animal and remove normal tissue. Be sure to remove any lymph nodes from tumor! Store in RPMI containing 5% FBS on ice until processing.

steps.title: Transfer tumor tissue into 3mL RPMI+5%FBS...
steps.instruction: Transfer tumor tissue into 3mL RPMI+5%FBS in a GentleMACs C tube.

steps.title: Mince tumors using a GentleMACS dissociator (Miltenyi)
steps.instruction: Mince tumors using a GentleMACS dissociator (Miltenyi). Use protocol 'm_imptumor_01'.

steps.title: Transfer tissue to a 50 mL conical tube
steps.instruction: Transfer tissue to a 50 mL conical tube. Add 35 mL of collagenase (pre-warmed to 37C).

steps.title: Put tubes on a MACS Mix...
steps.instruction: Put tubes on a MACS Mix Rotator and place in the 37C incubator rotating on medium speed for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Spin down tubes at 369 xg...
steps.instruction: Spin down tubes at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Remove supernatant and resuspend tissue in 5mL RPMI+5%FBS
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and resuspend tissue in 5mL RPMI+5%FBS. Smash sample through a 70um filter.

steps.title: Spin down tubes at 369 xg...
steps.instruction: Spin down tubes at 369 xg for 4-5 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 5mL of 44% Percoll
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 5mL of 44% Percoll.

steps.title: Spin samples for 20 minutes at...
steps.instruction: Spin samples for 20 minutes at 809 xg at room temperature with NO BRAKE.

steps.title: Remove and discard fat layer floating on top
steps.instruction: Remove and discard fat layer floating on top. Gently remove the cells at the interface and transfer to a fresh tube.

steps.title: Wash cells with 15mL RPMI+5% FBS
steps.instruction: Wash cells with 15mL RPMI+5% FBS. Spin cells at 518 xg for 10 minutes at 4C.

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant. Resuspend cells in either RPMI+5% FBS and store on ice until use, or proceed directly to cell staining for FACS.
